title: Stories Untold
short_description: An experimental anthology of four short horror stories, each with unique gameplay mechanics.
description: Stories Untold is an experimental narrative adventure game from No Code, structured as an anthology of four distinct episodes. Each chapter presents a different style of gameplay — from text-adventure horror to scientific equipment puzzles — all woven together by a dark, interconnected mystery. Drawing inspiration from 1980s aesthetics and classic television series like The Twilight Zone, the game earned widespread praise for its inventive design and was nominated for a BAFTA for Best Debut Game.

awards.name: The Game Awards Best Debut Indie Game
